name: front fixed mount bracket for v228.2 PTO area
notes: no new rover-core holes; bolts to existing/front PTO mount candidate; support-free flat/vertical bracket

name: hinge bearing crossbar for up/down rake motion
notes: accepts approx 5-6mm metal shaft; printed pin is dry-fit only; actual load should use metal shaft

name: left support arm / yielding rake arm
notes: hinged arm; can lift upward if rake catches; use shear pin / latch for weak-link behavior

name: right support arm / yielding rake arm
notes: same geometry as left; mirror only in assembly

name: replaceable tine comb holding bar
notes: nine tine holes; use printed tines for dry-fit or metal/bent wire tines for muddy load tests

name: replaceable blunt rake tine
notes: qty 9; blunt non-cutting tip; shallow mud disturbance only; should fail before rover core if overloaded

name: left depth limiting skid
notes: keeps tines around 10/20/30mm mud depth; rounded sled shape; avoids mud-trap cavities

name: right depth limiting skid
notes: same geometry as left; mirror only in assembly

name: skid height adjustment plate
notes: holes/marks for 10/20/30mm depth settings; print two

name: printed weak shear pin
notes: not for production load; intended to fail or release before the rover core/PTO is damaged

name: manual drop release lever
notes: used for MANUAL_DROP; pull/press to release latch without PTO

name: manual lift cord / wire anchor
notes: anchor for cord/wire so operator can lift/release in water tank tests

name: PTO drop cam for short release motion
notes: PTO_DROP only; does not drive continuous weeding; stop PTO after release

name: PTO drop link
notes: short visible link; do not bury in mud; use metal pins for load tests

name: drop latch / raised-state latch
notes: holds rake up; can be released manually or by PTO cam; geometry is first-fit candidate

name: drop limit stop
notes: prevents over-drop that could damage PTO/front mount; print two

name: left detachable front mini float
notes: optional trim float; not waterproof by printing alone; seal/coat/foam fill before water tests

name: right detachable front mini float
notes: same as left; keeps front PTO from nosing down; optional and removable

name: 10/20/30mm rake depth gauge
notes: dry-fit gauge for 10/20/30mm tine depth settings

name: 300mm row width gauge reference only
notes: do not print as one piece on Bambu A1; use 150mm A/B split gauge parts instead

name: 150mm row width gauge half A reference only
usage: row spacing gauge half A reference
notes: reference-only; use a ruler/tape or create a separate simple gauge outside dense print workflow

name: 150mm row width gauge half B reference only
usage: row spacing gauge half B reference
notes: reference-only; use a ruler/tape or create a separate simple gauge outside dense print workflow

name: optional TPU soft limit bumper
notes: optional TPU bumper for drop-limit impact; remove if TPU workflow should be skipped
